monster.name: MalachiasOmbrascura

trait.name: Breath Weapon
trait.text: once per short rest, 4.5m / 15ft / 3qd cone. Dexterity save DC 11, 2d6 damage (type depends on lineage — to be defined).

trait.name: Divine Eminence
trait.text: as a bonus action, can grant a creature within 9m / 30ft a 1d4 bonus to an attack roll or saving throw (3 uses/day).

monster.description: A dragonborn with a subdued air who goes by Elemir Strunz to hide his true identity. He blends in among Axel Ruby's followers in the East zone, trying to go unnoticed. He has a star-shaped scar on his left calf — a mark that could betray him if someone knows what to look for. Distinctive trait: he speaks little and chooses his words carefully. When he lies, he tends to touch his left calf — a tell that attentive players can notice.
